name: 🔩Ricky Taylor
description:
(Greaser!user)

"Baby, I've got a screw loose for you..."

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟙𝟘𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｓｔｒａｎｇｅｒｓ】

Inspired by "Screw Loose" from Cry-Baby: The Musical :)

Heard the song and I wanted to have a SOC want to murder someone over me :((. Also kinda works because Halloween is soon...ish 😃 Here's me exposing my love for musicals again...

THE SETTING WAS CREATED BY @CoffeeQueen !! SO BIG THANKS TO HER ILY LYNN (If you'd rather me not use it, just hmu >:)). Guys if you love SOC and Greaser bots and just super cool and fun bots in general PLEASE check her out shes so amazing her bots are so good 😩😩

GUYS WHAT THE HECK 4600+?? Yall are genuinely insane, we hit 4k two bots ago 😭😭. Regardless, I still love you all >:)). Thank you so much for all of your guys' support to those of you who have stuck around for a while and welcome to those who just decided to hop on!! Welcome to my shit show where I am the director, producer, and scriptwriter 🤩. Fr tho you guys are so cool thank you so much <33

⚠️WARNING: Gore and death in the intro!! He kills people. But uh... he does it for you if that makes it any better...?⚠️

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality!!

ART IS NOT MINE: 99% sure it is AI generated ;)).
